notes: DRAFT operator decision package. Until approved=true, family premiums MUST NOT be treated as explained spread for BestChange certification or public re-enable.

SBPRUB.label: SBP RUB
SBPRUB.rationale: SBP payout friction + OTC RUB premium vs CBR mid; historical active USDT/SBP quotes often 4–8% above CBR.

SBERRUB.label: Sberbank RUB
SBERRUB.rationale: Bank rail premium similar to SBP; confirm with treasury.

TCSBRUB.label: Tinkoff / T-Bank RUB
TCSBRUB.rationale: Same OTC RUB family as SBP/Sber pending operator confirmation.

ACRUB.label: Advanced Cash RUB
ACRUB.rationale: E-wallet rail; typically tighter than cash/bank OTC.

CARDRUB.label: Visa/MC RUB card
CARDRUB.rationale: Card acquiring / chargeback risk premium; confirm with ops.

CASHRUB.label: Cash RUB
CASHRUB.rationale: Cash handling premium; highest legitimate band candidate.

OTHER_RUB.label: Other RUB rails
OTHER_RUB.rationale: Catch-all until mapped to a named family.

operator_checklist: Confirm proposed premium ranges against last 30 days of filled orders and treasury P&L
Decide whether direction.profit must equal family premium or may be additive
Set approved=true and approved_by/approved_at only after explicit sign-off
Re-run rates:economic-audit and rebuild BESTCHANGE_COIN_RUB_FINAL_V4 after approval
Do not re-enable ZEC→RUB until ZEC baseline stays fresh across ≥2 parser cycles and family policy is approved
